rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation with Aaker and Lee (2001) when the authors introduce regulatory relevance and note that fit can improve persuasion. The citing paper does not discuss the 2006 article's specific arguments, mechanisms, or boundary conditions separately, and later contribution claims focus on extending Aaker and Lee (2001) and Lee and Aaker (2004). Because this reference serves as broad background support rather than a distinct building block, its function is best classified as a passing mention.
